The design of the Rubin NVLink 6 Switch tray is also simpler and relatively seamless compared to the first Oberon NVLink 5 Switch released for GB200 because Rubin NVLink 6 Switch trays will not use flyover cables. As such, all NVLink signals will run over the PCB.

pro.text: 每个 VR NVL72 交换机托盘包含 4 颗 NVLink 6 交换机 ASIC 和一个系统管理模块。与为 GB200 发布的首款 Oberon NVLink 5 交换机相比，Rubin NVLink 6 交换机托盘的设计更简单且相对更无缝，因为 Rubin NVLink 6 交换机托盘将不再使用架空线缆（Flyover Cables）。因此，所有 NVLink 信号都将在 PCB 上传输。

paragraphs.source: The NVLink 6 Switch board is liquid cooled and will be covered with a cold plate, which is a single module. Connected to the NVSwitch tray is the system management module (SMM) that comes with a CPU and acts as a host to the switch tray. The switch tray to SMM connection uses flyover cables, but this is the only flyover cable connection required in the entire Vera Rubin NVL72 system. Given that the PCIe connection is lower speed and the NVLink Switch tray contains relatively few modules, assembly of the switch tray is unlikely to be challenging.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The NVLink 6 Switch board is liquid cooled and will be covered with a cold plate, which is a single module. Connected to the NVSwitch tray is the system management module (SMM) that comes with a CPU and acts as a host to the switch tray. The switch tray to SMM connection uses flyover cables, but this is the only flyover cable connection required in the entire Vera Rubin NVL72 system. Given that the PCIe connection is lower speed and the NVLink Switch tray contains relatively few modules, assembly of the switch tray is unlikely to be challenging.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The NVLink 6 Switch board is liquid cooled and will be covered with a cold plate, which is a single module. Connected to the NVSwitch tray is the system management module (SMM) that comes with a CPU and acts as a host to the switch tray. The switch tray to SMM connection uses flyover cables, but this is the only flyover cable connection required in the entire Vera Rubin NVL72 system. Given that the PCIe connection is lower speed and the NVLink Switch tray contains relatively few modules, assembly of the switch tray is unlikely to be challenging.

pro.text: NVLink 6 交换机板采用液冷散热，并由一个单模块结构的冷板覆盖。与 NVSwitch 托盘连接的是系统管理模块（SMM），它配备有 CPU 并充当交换机托盘的主机。交换机托盘与 SMM 的连接使用了架空线缆，但这是整个 Vera Rubin NVL72 系统中唯一需要的架空线缆连接。鉴于 PCIe 连接速度较低，且 NVLink 交换机托盘包含的模块相对较少，交换机托盘的组装不太可能面临挑战。

paragraphs.source: The diagram below shows how the NVLink 6 signal traverses through the tray. Each of the green lines represents nine 400G logical ports of NVLink 6, or 18 TX/RX lanes of 200G. Because there is only 1 DP per lane using bidirectional SerDes, there are a total of 18 DPs between any connector and any switch for a total of 72 DPs per connector, which is the same as prior generation of NVLink 5 Switch Tray.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The diagram below shows how the NVLink 6 signal traverses through the tray. Each of the green lines represents nine 400G logical ports of NVLink 6, or 18 TX/RX lanes of 200G. Because there is only 1 DP per lane using bidirectional SerDes, there are a total of 18 DPs between any connector and any switch for a total of 72 DPs per connector, which is the same as prior generation of NVLink 5 Switch Tray.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The diagram below shows how the NVLink 6 signal traverses through the tray. Each of the green lines represents nine 400G logical ports of NVLink 6, or 18 TX/RX lanes of 200G. Because there is only 1 DP per lane using bidirectional SerDes, there are a total of 18 DPs between any connector and any switch for a total of 72 DPs per connector, which is the same as prior generation of NVLink 5 Switch Tray.

pro.text: 下图展示了 NVLink 6 信号在托盘内的传输路径。每条绿线代表 9 个 NVLink 6 的 400G 逻辑端口，即 18 条 200G 的 TX/RX 通道。由于使用双向 SerDes，每条通道仅需 1 个差分对（DP），因此在任何连接器与任何交换机之间总共有 18 个 DP，每个连接器总计 72 个 DP，这与上一代 NVLink 5 交换机托盘相同。

paragraphs.source: As previously explained, high speed signals require better PCB materials, especially for NVLink 6 which has much lower tolerance for insertion loss given the use of bidirectional signaling. The number of lanes between the PaladinHD2 connectors and the NVLink Switch also creates complexity for PCB design. Hence, the NVLink 6 Switch board PCB is upgraded to 32 layers with M8+ graded CCL - minimally LDK2 glass fiber cloth or potentially Quartz fiber cloth.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As previously explained, high speed signals require better PCB materials, especially for NVLink 6 which has much lower tolerance for insertion loss given the use of bidirectional signaling. The number of lanes between the PaladinHD2 connectors and the NVLink Switch also creates complexity for PCB design. Hence, the NVLink 6 Switch board PCB is upgraded to 32 layers with M8+ graded CCL - minimally LDK2 glass fiber cloth or potentially Quartz fiber cloth.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As previously explained, high speed signals require better PCB materials, especially for NVLink 6 which has much lower tolerance for insertion loss given the use of bidirectional signaling. The number of lanes between the PaladinHD2 connectors and the NVLink Switch also creates complexity for PCB design. Hence, the NVLink 6 Switch board PCB is upgraded to 32 layers with M8+ graded CCL - minimally LDK2 glass fiber cloth or potentially Quartz fiber cloth.

pro.text: 正如前文所述，高速信号需要更好的 PCB 材料，特别是对于 NVLink 6 而言，由于采用了双向信号传输，其对插入损耗（insertion loss）的容忍度大大降低。PaladinHD2 连接器与 NVLink 交换机之间的通道数量也增加了 PCB 设计的复杂性。因此，NVLink 6 交换机板的 PCB 升级到了 32 层，并采用 M8+ 级覆铜板（CCL）——至少使用 LDK2 玻纤布，甚至可能使用石英纤维布。

paragraphs.source: Zooming out, backplane copper cables are used to connect NVLink Switch trays to the GPU trays for the VR NVL72 system. Although the bandwidth doubles, with bi-directional SerDes, the number of cables required does not change from the GB300 backplane generation to the Vera Rubin NVL72 backplane generation. The number of connectors and the number of DPs per connector also does not change from Grace Blackwell NVL72 to VR NVL72.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Zooming out, backplane copper cables are used to connect NVLink Switch trays to the GPU trays for the VR NVL72 system. Although the bandwidth doubles, with bi-directional SerDes, the number of cables required does not change from the GB300 backplane generation to the Vera Rubin NVL72 backplane generation. The number of connectors and the number of DPs per connector also does not change from Grace Blackwell NVL72 to VR NVL72.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Zooming out, backplane copper cables are used to connect NVLink Switch trays to the GPU trays for the VR NVL72 system. Although the bandwidth doubles, with bi-directional SerDes, the number of cables required does not change from the GB300 backplane generation to the Vera Rubin NVL72 backplane generation. The number of connectors and the number of DPs per connector also does not change from Grace Blackwell NVL72 to VR NVL72.

pro.text: 从宏观角度看，VR NVL72 系统使用背板铜缆将 NVLink 交换机托盘与 GPU 托盘相连。尽管带宽翻倍，但得益于双向 SerDes，从 GB300 背板世代到 Vera Rubin NVL72 背板世代，所需的线缆数量并未改变。从 Grace Blackwell NVL72 到 VR NVL72，连接器的数量以及每个连接器的 DP 数量也保持不变。

paragraphs.source: While the VR NVL72 system features GPUs and scale-up switches that are connected by copper cables, the VR HGX system features servers consisting of eight Rubin GPUs and four NVLink Switch chips. The second meaningful difference between the NVL72 and HGX deployments is that the former has a scale-out bandwidth of 1.6T per GPU while the latter only has a scale-out bandwidth of 800G per GPU. How is it that all Rubin 200 deployments use CX-9 NICs even though some deployments have half the per GPU scale-out bandwidth?
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: While the VR NVL72 system features GPUs and scale-up switches that are connected by copper cables, the VR HGX system features servers consisting of eight Rubin GPUs and four NVLink Switch chips. The second meaningful difference between the NVL72 and HGX deployments is that the former has a scale-out bandwidth of 1.6T per GPU while the latter only has a scale-out bandwidth of 800G per GPU. How is it that all Rubin 200 deployments use CX-9 NICs even though some deployments have half the per GPU scale-out bandwidth?
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: While the VR NVL72 system features GPUs and scale-up switches that are connected by copper cables, the VR HGX system features servers consisting of eight Rubin GPUs and four NVLink Switch chips. The second meaningful difference between the NVL72 and HGX deployments is that the former has a scale-out bandwidth of 1.6T per GPU while the latter only has a scale-out bandwidth of 800G per GPU. How is it that all Rubin 200 deployments use CX-9 NICs even though some deployments have half the per GPU scale-out bandwidth?

pro.text: VR NVL72 系统的 GPU 和 Scale-up 交换机通过铜缆连接，而 VR HGX 系统则采用由 8 颗 Rubin GPU 和 4 颗 NVLink 交换机芯片组成的服务器。NVL72 和 HGX 部署之间的第二个显著区别在于，前者每颗 GPU 拥有 1.6T 的横向扩展（Scale-out）带宽，而后者每颗 GPU 仅有 800G 的横向扩展带宽。既然部分部署的单 GPU 横向扩展带宽只有一半，为何所有 Rubin 200 部署都使用 CX-9 网卡？

paragraphs.source: The HGX Rubin NVL8 server consists of eight 800G CX-9 NIC packages – one NIC per GPU – which means that the scale-out bandwidth does not increase from its predecessor, the HGX B300 server. The Vera Rubin NVL72 deployment on the other hand doubles the per GPU scale-out bandwidth to 1.6T, but not by doubling the bandwidth per NIC. Rather, the “1.6T NIC” attached to each Rubin chip is comprised of two 800G CX-9 packages that is connected to the Vera CPU by PCIe Gen 6.0 lanes.

The Vera Rubin NVL72 deployment on the other hand doubles the per GPU scale-out bandwidth to 1.6T, but not by doubling the bandwidth per NIC. The Vera Rubin NVL72 deployment on the other hand doubles the per GPU scale-out bandwidth to 1.6T, but not by doubling the bandwidth per NIC. Rather, the “1.6T NIC” attached to each Rubin chip is comprised of two 800G CX-9 packages that is connected to the Vera CPU by PCIe Gen 6.0 lanes.

pro.text: HGX Rubin NVL8 服务器包含 8 个 800G CX-9 网卡封装——每颗 GPU 对应一个网卡——这意味着其 Scale-out 带宽较其前代产品 HGX B300 服务器并未提升。相比之下，Vera Rubin NVL72 部署将单 GPU 的 Scale-out 带宽翻倍至 1.6T，但这并非通过翻倍单个网卡的带宽实现的。相反，连接到每颗 Rubin 芯片的“1.6T 网卡”由两个 800G CX-9 封装组成，并通过 PCIe Gen 6.0 通道连接到 Vera CPU。

paragraphs.source: Each compute tray on the VR NVL72 has eight 800G CX-9 NICs, but there are two possibilities for the number of OSFP cages - either one 1.6T OSFP cage per GPU for a total of 4 per compute tray, or two 800G OSFP cages per GPU for a total of 8 cages per compute tray. We think that the latter would be the more popular deployment assumption, and will be the base case for our discussion of scale-out networking architectures in later sections of the article.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Each compute tray on the VR NVL72 has eight 800G CX-9 NICs, but there are two possibilities for the number of OSFP cages - either one 1.6T OSFP cage per GPU for a total of 4 per compute tray, or two 800G OSFP cages per GPU for a total of 8 cages per compute tray. We think that the latter would be the more popular deployment assumption, and will be the base case for our discussion of scale-out networking architectures in later sections of the article.

We think that the latter would be the more popular deployment assumption, and will be the base case for our discussion of scale-out networking architectures in later sections of the article.

pro.text: VR NVL72 的每个算力托盘拥有 8 个 800G CX-9 网卡，但关于 OSFP 笼子（cage）的数量存在两种可能性：要么每颗 GPU 配备一个 1.6T OSFP 笼子，即每个算力托盘总共 4 个；要么每颗 GPU 配备两个 800G OSFP 笼子，即每个算力托盘总共 8 个。我们认为后者将是更主流的部署假设，并将其作为本文后续章节讨论 Scale-out 网络架构的基础案例。

paragraphs.source: Broadly, there are three flavors of scale-out deployments for Vera Rubin NVL72. We have InfiniBand-based clusters which employ the NVIDIA Quantum series of switches, NVIDIA Ethernet-based clusters employing Spectrum series switches and lastly, non-Nvidia Ethernet such as Tomahawk-based, Cisco Silicon One or Teralynx-based Ethernet switches. Some Ethernet-based clusters deployed by hyperscalers will use AECs for NIC-to-TOR and switch-to-switch connections, while other Ethernet-based clusters using only optical interconnects will usually adopt a multi-plane and multi-rail networking architecture.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Broadly, there are three flavors of scale-out deployments for Vera Rubin NVL72. We have InfiniBand-based clusters which employ the NVIDIA Quantum series of switches, NVIDIA Ethernet-based clusters employing Spectrum series switches and lastly, non-Nvidia Ethernet such as Tomahawk-based, Cisco Silicon One or Teralynx-based Ethernet switches. Some Ethernet-based clusters deployed by hyperscalers will use AECs for NIC-to-TOR and switch-to-switch connections, while other Ethernet-based clusters using only optical interconnects will usually adopt a multi-plane and multi-rail networking architecture. What is particularly noteworthy about Vera Rubin NVL72 deployments, however, is that it is the first Nvidia GPU generation where we will be seeing some Co-Packaged-Optics (CPO) deployments in the scale-out backend network.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Broadly, there are three flavors of scale-out deployments for Vera Rubin NVL72. We have InfiniBand-based clusters which employ the NVIDIA Quantum series of switches, NVIDIA Ethernet-based clusters employing Spectrum series switches and lastly, non-Nvidia Ethernet such as Tomahawk-based, Cisco Silicon One or Teralynx-based Ethernet switches. Some Ethernet-based clusters deployed by hyperscalers will use AECs for NIC-to-TOR and switch-to-switch connections, while other Ethernet-based clusters using only optical interconnects will usually adopt a multi-plane and multi-rail networking architecture. What is particularly noteworthy about Vera Rubin NVL72 deployments, however, is that it is the first Nvidia GPU generation where we will be seeing some Co-Packaged-Optics (CPO) deployments in the scale-out backend network.

pro.text: 广义上，Vera Rubin NVL72 的 Scale-out 部署有三种形式。一种是采用英伟达（NVIDIA） Quantum 系列交换机的基于 InfiniBand 的集群；一种是采用 Spectrum 系列交换机的基于英伟达以太网的集群；最后一种是基于非英伟达以太网（如 Tomahawk、Cisco Silicon One 或 Teralynx）的以太网交换机集群。一些由超大规模云厂商（hyperscalers）部署的基于以太网的集群将使用 AEC 进行网卡到机架顶端交换机（NIC-to-TOR）以及交换机之间的连接，而其他仅使用光互连的基于以太网的集群通常会采用多平面（multi-plane）和多轨（multi-rail）网络架构。

paragraphs.source: While there are both InfiniBand and Spectrum-X based clusters, the InfiniBand-based Quantum X800-34XX series of switches is more popular with Neoclouds than with hyperscalers. For InfiniBand, there are two deployment types – the first is the Quantum X800-Q3400 with pluggable optics and the second is the Quantum X800-Q3450 CPO-based switch that use co-packaged Optical Engines (OE) instead of pluggable transceivers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: While there are both InfiniBand and Spectrum-X based clusters, the InfiniBand-based Quantum X800-34XX series of switches is more popular with Neoclouds than with hyperscalers. For InfiniBand, there are two deployment types – the first is the Quantum X800-Q3400 with pluggable optics and the second is the Quantum X800-Q3450 CPO-based switch that use co-packaged Optical Engines (OE) instead of pluggable transceivers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: While there are both InfiniBand and Spectrum-X based clusters, the InfiniBand-based Quantum X800-34XX series of switches is more popular with Neoclouds than with hyperscalers. For InfiniBand, there are two deployment types – the first is the Quantum X800-Q3400 with pluggable optics and the second is the Quantum X800-Q3450 CPO-based switch that use co-packaged Optical Engines (OE) instead of pluggable transceivers.

pro.text: 虽然同时存在基于 InfiniBand 和 Spectrum-X 的集群，但基于 InfiniBand 的 Quantum X800-34XX 系列交换机在新型云服务商（Neoclouds）中比在超大规模云厂商中更受欢迎。对于 InfiniBand，有两种部署类型：第一种是配备可插拔光组件的 Quantum X800-Q3400；第二种是基于 CPO 的 Quantum X800-Q3450 交换机，它使用共封装光学引擎（OE）而非可插拔收发器。

paragraphs.source: The Quantum X800-Q3400 is logically a multi-plane switch combining 4 Quantum-3 ASICs into a single switch box, though we will dive into this equivalence later in the article. This multi-plane “topology” is abstracted away and as far as network engineers are concerned, the Q3400 is a single switch with 144 ports – or a “little boy” switch.

pro.text: Quantum X800-Q3400 在逻辑上是一个多平面交换机，将 4 颗 Quantum-3 ASIC 组合成一个单一的交换机机箱，尽管我们将在本文稍后深入探讨这种等效性。这种多平面“拓扑”被抽象掉了，就网络工程师而言，Q3400 是一个拥有 144 个端口的单一交换机——或者说是一个“小男孩（little boy）”交换机。

paragraphs.source: For the Vera Rubin NVL72 deployment however, there are two 800G OSFP cages per GPU for a total of 1.6T per GPU bandwidth. Having two 800G logical ports per GPU is advantageous because it allows multi-plane network deployments without complex fiber management – by splitting one logical GPU two ways to two different leaf switches. As such, larger network clusters can be built with two 800G logical ports than if only one 1.6T logical port were used. In fact, as we have explained in multiple prior articles such as the networking sections of NVIDIA’s Optical Boogeyman and Microsoft’s AI Strategy Deconstructed, this relationship is dictated by a simple formula for the maximum number of hosts that can be supported using a switch of k ports on an L-layer:

inline_elements.text: NVIDIA’s Optical Boogeyman
Microsoft’s AI Strategy Deconstructed

pro.text: 然而，对于 Vera Rubin NVL72 的部署，每颗 GPU 配备了两个 800G OSFP 笼子，总计实现每颗 GPU 1.6T 的带宽。每颗 GPU 拥有两个 800G 逻辑端口具有显著优势，因为它允许在无需复杂光纤管理的情况下实现多平面网络部署——通过将一个逻辑 GPU 拆分连接到两个不同的叶交换机。因此，与仅使用一个 1.6T 逻辑端口相比，使用两个 800G 逻辑端口可以构建更大规模的网络集群。事实上，正如我们在之前的多篇文章（例如 英伟达的光学梦魇 和 微软 AI 战略深度解析 的网络部分）中所解释的那样，这种关系遵循一个简单的公式，用于计算在 L 层架构下，使用具有 k 个端口（吞吐基数（Radix））的交换机所能支持的最大主机数量：

paragraphs.source: By one 1.6T logical port, we mean that the two 800G OSFP cages connected to each GPU are connected to a single, dual-port 1.6T transceiver at the leaf layer because the two 800G ports are effectively performing the function of one 1.6T port – and hence the term “logical”.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: By one 1.6T logical port, we mean that the two 800G OSFP cages connected to each GPU are connected to a single, dual-port 1.6T transceiver at the leaf layer because the two 800G ports are effectively performing the function of one 1.6T port – and hence the term “logical”.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: By one 1.6T logical port, we mean that the two 800G OSFP cages connected to each GPU are connected to a single, dual-port 1.6T transceiver at the leaf layer because the two 800G ports are effectively performing the function of one 1.6T port – and hence the term “logical”.

pro.text: 所谓“一个 1.6T 逻辑端口”，是指连接到每颗 GPU 的两个 800G OSFP 笼子在叶层连接到一个单一的双端口 1.6T 收发器，因为这两个 800G 端口实际上在履行一个 1.6T 端口的职能——这就是“逻辑”一词的含义。

paragraphs.source: Aside from the X800-Q3400 air-cooled switch, NVIDIA will also offer a CPO version, which is the X800-Q3450 containing the same 144 ports of 800G. As pointed out earlier, what is unique about both switches is that each switch box consists of four 28.8T Quantum-3 Switch ASICs for a total of 115.2T per box switching capacity. When used in conjunction with the VR NVL72 servers, the signal from the NIC at the leaf layer is split four ways – 200G each way – to each switch ASIC within the box. Such a configuration bears logical equivalence to a 4-plane network architecture.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Aside from the X800-Q3400 air-cooled switch, NVIDIA will also offer a CPO version, which is the X800-Q3450 containing the same 144 ports of 800G. As pointed out earlier, what is unique about both switches is that each switch box consists of four 28.8T Quantum-3 Switch ASICs for a total of 115.2T per box switching capacity. When used in conjunction with the VR NVL72 servers, the signal from the NIC at the leaf layer is split four ways – 200G each way – to each switch ASIC within the box. Such a configuration bears logical equivalence to a 4-plane network architecture.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Aside from the X800-Q3400 air-cooled switch, NVIDIA will also offer a CPO version, which is the X800-Q3450 containing the same 144 ports of 800G. As pointed out earlier, what is unique about both switches is that each switch box consists of four 28.8T Quantum-3 Switch ASICs for a total of 115.2T per box switching capacity. When used in conjunction with the VR NVL72 servers, the signal from the NIC at the leaf layer is split four ways – 200G each way – to each switch ASIC within the box. Such a configuration bears logical equivalence to a 4-plane network architecture.

pro.text: 除了 X800-Q3400 风冷交换机外，英伟达（NVIDIA）还将提供 CPO 版本，即包含相同 144 个 800G 端口的 X800-Q3450。如前所述，这两款交换机的独特之处在于，每个交换机机箱都由四个 28.8T Quantum-3 交换机 ASIC 组成，单机箱总交换容量达到 115.2T。当与 VR NVL72 服务器配合使用时，来自叶层网卡（NIC）的信号被分成四路——每路 200G——分别连接到机箱内的每个交换机 ASIC。这种配置在逻辑上等同于四平面网络架构。

paragraphs.source: We think that the SN6800 switch with 512 ports of 800G will be quite attractive to Neoclouds because it simplifies deployments. Similar to the X800-Q3400 scale-out network, an SN6800 scale-out network could consist of two switch planes though the SN6800 enables a much larger feasible scale-out world size.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: We think that the SN6800 switch with 512 ports of 800G will be quite attractive to Neoclouds because it simplifies deployments. Similar to the X800-Q3400 scale-out network, an SN6800 scale-out network could consist of two switch planes though the SN6800 enables a much larger feasible scale-out world size.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: We think that the SN6800 switch with 512 ports of 800G will be quite attractive to Neoclouds because it simplifies deployments. Similar to the X800-Q3400 scale-out network, an SN6800 scale-out network could consist of two switch planes though the SN6800 enables a much larger feasible scale-out world size.

pro.text: 我们认为，拥有 512 个 800G 端口的 SN6800 交换机对 Neoclouds 将非常有吸引力，因为它简化了部署。与 X800-Q3400 的 Scale-out 网络类似，SN6800 的 Scale-out 网络也可以由两个交换平面组成，但 SN6800 能够实现更大规模的可行 Scale-out 集群规模（World Size）。

paragraphs.source: As discussed in our recent deep dive article on co-packaged optics, the first reason is that a significant amount of power can be saved by eliminating most of the transceiver content. If we compare the power consumption of one 800G DR4 optical transceiver (16-17W) to the power required by optical engines (OEs) and external light source (ELS) modules to delivery an equivalent 800G of bandwidth in the scale-out network, we see an average ~70% reduction in power used for optical transceivers. Taking a step back, this would translate to 10% in savings for the total networking equipment power consumption in a 3-Layer HGX Rubin NVL8 cluster.

inline_elements.text: deep dive article on co-packaged optics,

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As discussed in our recent [deep dive article on co-packaged optics,](https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/p/co-packaged-optics-cpo-book-scaling) the first reason is that a significant amount of power can be saved by eliminating most of the transceiver content. If we compare the power consumption of one 800G DR4 optical transceiver (16-17W) to the power required by optical engines (OEs) and external light source (ELS) modules to delivery an equivalent 800G of bandwidth in the scale-out network, we see an average ~70% reduction in power used for optical transceivers. Taking a step back, this would translate to 10% in savings for the total networking equipment power consumption in a 3-Layer HGX Rubin NVL8 cluster. This reduction in networking equipment power consumption is however relatively insignificant and amounts to only ~1% of total cluster power consumption because the server’s power budget dominates the equation.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As discussed in our recent deep dive article on co-packaged optics, the first reason is that a significant amount of power can be saved by eliminating most of the transceiver content. If we compare the power consumption of one 800G DR4 optical transceiver (16-17W) to the power required by optical engines (OEs) and external light source (ELS) modules to delivery an equivalent 800G of bandwidth in the scale-out network, we see an average ~70% reduction in power used for optical transceivers. Taking a step back, this would translate to 10% in savings for the total networking equipment power consumption in a 3-Layer HGX Rubin NVL8 cluster. This reduction in networking equipment power consumption is however relatively insignificant and amounts to only ~1% of total cluster power consumption because the server’s power budget dominates the equation.

pro.text: 正如我们在最近那篇关于共封装光学（CPO）的深度解析文章，中所讨论的，首要原因在于通过消除大部分光收发器组件，可以节省大量功耗。如果我们将单个 800G DR4 光收发器（16-17W）的功耗，与在 Scale-out 网络中提供等效 800G 带宽所需的光学引擎（OE）及外部光源（ELS）模块的功耗进行对比，可以发现光收发器环节的功耗平均降低了约 70%。从全局来看，这相当于为一个三层 HGX Rubin NVL8 集群节省了 10% 的网络设备总功耗。

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As discussed in our recent [deep dive article on co-packaged optics,](https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/p/co-packaged-optics-cpo-book-scaling) the first reason is that a significant amount of power can be saved by eliminating most of the transceiver content. If we compare the power consumption of one 800G DR4 optical transceiver (16-17W) to the power required by optical engines (OEs) and external light source (ELS) modules to delivery an equivalent 800G of bandwidth in the scale-out network, we see an average ~70% reduction in power used for optical transceivers. Taking a step back, this would translate to 10% in savings for the total networking equipment power consumption in a 3-Layer HGX Rubin NVL8 cluster. This reduction in networking equipment power consumption is however relatively insignificant and amounts to only ~1% of total cluster power consumption because the server’s power budget dominates the equation.

If we compare the power consumption of one 800G DR4 optical transceiver (16-17W) to the power required by optical engines (OEs) and external light source (ELS) modules to delivery an equivalent 800G of bandwidth in the scale-out network, we see an average ~70% reduction in power used for optical transceivers. Taking a step back, this would translate to 10% in savings for the total networking equipment power consumption in a 3-Layer HGX Rubin NVL8 cluster. This reduction in networking equipment power consumption is however relatively insignificant and amounts to only ~1% of total cluster power consumption because the server’s power budget dominates the equation.

paragraphs.source: The second benefit is a reduction in cost stemming from eliminating almost all transceivers. There is even more room for price reduction if we are looking at NVIDIA LinkX transceivers, which tend to be priced at significant premium to their generic equivalent. If we compare total networking costs for a 3-Layer network with and without CPO-based switches in the scale-out domain, we see an average of ~75% reduction in transceiver costs. However, as with the power savings above, such costs savings tend not to move the needle dramatically considering the full cluster costs.

pro.text: 第二个优势是由于几乎消除了所有收发器而带来的成本降低。如果考虑到英伟达（NVIDIA）LinkX 收发器，降价空间会更大，因为这些收发器的价格往往比同类通用产品有显著溢价。如果我们对比 Scale-out 领域中采用和不采用基于 CPO 交换机的三层网络总成本，可以看到收发器成本平均降低了约 75%。然而，与上述功耗节省的情况类似，考虑到整个集群的总成本，这类成本节省往往无法产生决定性的影响。

paragraphs.source: Increased overall network reliability is another compelling point. Transceivers can be unreliable, with a large cluster certain to have ongoing link flaps. Meta’s study presented at ECOC showed strong reliability results over 15M 400G port-device hours, which is about equivalent 15 CPO switches tested for 11 months in a lab. It is an encouraging start – but we think this point could get stronger with more in field test deployments.

inline_elements.text: Meta’s study presented at ECOC

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Increased overall network reliability is another compelling point. Transceivers can be unreliable, with a large cluster certain to have ongoing link flaps. [Meta’s study presented at ECOC](https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/i/178153689/when-will-cpo-be-ready-for-primetime) showed strong reliability results over 15M 400G port-device hours, which is about equivalent 15 CPO switches tested for 11 months in a lab. It is an encouraging start – but we think this point could get stronger with more in field test deployments.

parent_inline_elements.text: Meta’s study presented at ECOC

pro.text: 提升整体网络可靠性是另一个引人注目的论点。收发器可能并不可靠，大型集群肯定会不断出现链路抖动（link flaps）。Meta 在 ECOC 上展示的研究显示，在超过 1500 万个 400G 端口设备小时（port-device hours）中，可靠性表现强劲，这大约相当于 15 台 CPO 交换机在实验室中测试 11 个月的结果。这是一个令人鼓舞的开始，但我们认为，随着更多现场测试部署的开展，这一论点将更具说服力。

paragraphs.source: The last factor in favor of adoption of CPO that we would like to mention is the fact that some of Nvidia’s CPO switch SKUs contain the integrated fiber shuffle and can simplify the installation and maintenance of multi-plane network architectures. Recall that the SN6800 contains four Switch ASICs in a multi-plane configuration connected to ports via an integrated fiber shuffle, delivering 409.6T aggregate bandwidth, while the SN6810 uses one Switch ASIC, but without any integrated fiber shuffle, to deliver 102.4T aggregate bandwidth.

pro.text: 我们想提到的支持采用 CPO 的最后一个因素是，某些英伟达（NVIDIA）的 CPO 交换机 SKU 包含集成的光纤重排（fiber shuffle），可以简化多平面网络架构的安装和维护。回想一下，SN6800 在多平面配置中包含四个交换机 ASIC，通过集成的光纤重排连接到端口，提供 409.6T 的总聚合带宽；而 SN6810 使用一个交换机 ASIC，但不带任何集成的光纤重排，提供 102.4T 的总聚合带宽。

pro.text: 集群规模超过 10 万个 GPU 的大规模集群部署通常利用多平面网络架构，因为在当前的交换机世代中，单平面网络架构没有足够的逻辑端口来支持更大的网络，除非求助于 3 层或更多层的高数量交换层级。

paragraphs.source: Recall from above that a Vera Rubin NVL72 cluster built with Q3400-X800 switches at 1.6T logical ports per GPU cannot scale beyond the maximum cluster size of 93,312 GPUs. pro.text: 回想上文，使用 Q3400-X800 交换机构建的 Vera Rubin NVL72 集群，在每个 GPU 拥有 1.6T 逻辑端口的情况下，其规模无法超过 93,312 个 GPU 的最大集群限制。即使未来的交换机世代继续将每个交换机箱的最大可能交换容量翻倍，由于每个 GPU 的带宽预计也会翻倍，这意味着集群网络中的有效逻辑端口数量不太可能发生变化。

paragraphs.source: What this means is that deployment of large-scale GPU clusters will continue to require multi-plane network architectures. Do note however that multi-plane networking architectures are not limited by size and we have also seen NVIDIA reference architecture deployments with multi-plane clusters that are significantly below 100k GPUs each.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: What this means is that deployment of large-scale GPU clusters will continue to require multi-plane network architectures. Do note however that multi-plane networking architectures are not limited by size and we have also seen NVIDIA reference architecture deployments with multi-plane clusters that are significantly below 100k GPUs each.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: What this means is that deployment of large-scale GPU clusters will continue to require multi-plane network architectures. Do note however that multi-plane networking architectures are not limited by size and we have also seen NVIDIA reference architecture deployments with multi-plane clusters that are significantly below 100k GPUs each.

pro.text: 这意味着大规模 GPU 集群的部署将继续需要多平面网络架构。但请注意，多平面网络架构并不受规模限制，我们也见过英伟达参考架构部署的多平面集群，其规模远低于每个集群 10 万个 GPU。

paragraphs.source: In multi-plane network architectures using the SN6600 switch instead of the CPO switch, each GPU fans out to multiple switch boxes using fiber shuffles. This requires customers to deploy shuffle boxes, patch panels and unwieldy octopus cables outside the switch box that introduce complexity in installation and maintenance.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In multi-plane network architectures using the SN6600 switch instead of the CPO switch, each GPU fans out to multiple switch boxes using fiber shuffles. This requires customers to deploy shuffle boxes, patch panels and unwieldy octopus cables outside the switch box that introduce complexity in installation and maintenance.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In multi-plane network architectures using the SN6600 switch instead of the CPO switch, each GPU fans out to multiple switch boxes using fiber shuffles. This requires customers to deploy shuffle boxes, patch panels and unwieldy octopus cables outside the switch box that introduce complexity in installation and maintenance.

pro.text: 在使用 SN6600 交换机而非 CPO 交换机的多平面网络架构中，每个 GPU 通过光纤重排扇出到多个交换机箱。这要求客户在交换机箱外内部署重排箱（shuffle boxes）、配线架和笨重的章鱼线缆（octopus cables），从而增加了安装和维护的复杂性。

paragraphs.source: Some of Nvidia’s CPO SKUs – such as the SN6800 and Q3450 –contain such a fiber shuffle within the switch box, with each optical engine fanning out to different logical ports. They therefore deliver higher aggregate bandwidth – 409.6T and 115.2T respectively than is possible with a switch box based on a single Switch ASIC.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Some of Nvidia’s CPO SKUs – such as the SN6800 and Q3450 –contain such a fiber shuffle within the switch box, with each optical engine fanning out to different logical ports. They therefore deliver higher aggregate bandwidth – 409.6T and 115.2T respectively than is possible with a switch box based on a single Switch ASIC.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Some of Nvidia’s CPO SKUs – such as the SN6800 and Q3450 –contain such a fiber shuffle within the switch box, with each optical engine fanning out to different logical ports. They therefore deliver higher aggregate bandwidth – 409.6T and 115.2T respectively than is possible with a switch box based on a single Switch ASIC.

pro.text: 英伟达的一些 CPO SKU——例如 SN6800 和 Q3450——在交换机箱内包含了这种光纤重排，每个光学引擎扇出到不同的逻辑端口。因此，它们提供的总聚合带宽（分别为 409.6T 和 115.2T）高于基于单个交换机 ASIC 的交换机箱所能达到的带宽。

译文为“混合网络”。
译文为“节点数量”。

paragraphs.source: For the SN6800 CPO switch, even though the bandwidth engine responsible for converting electrical to optical signals scales from 1.6T to 3.2T or 2x compared to the SN6600 switch, each 3.2T OE within the SN6800 switch box is split into four 800G logical ports that fan out within the box itself and exit the front panel through fiber connectors. This allows a single 1.6T GPU to fan out to two independent switch planes. In fact, the SN6800 switch box consists of four ASICs, which is similar to the X800-Q3400 switch box.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: For the SN6800 CPO switch, even though the bandwidth engine responsible for converting electrical to optical signals scales from 1.6T to 3.2T or 2x compared to the SN6600 switch, each 3.2T OE within the SN6800 switch box is split into four 800G logical ports that fan out within the box itself and exit the front panel through fiber connectors. This allows a single 1.6T GPU to fan out to two independent switch planes. In fact, the SN6800 switch box consists of four ASICs, which is similar to the X800-Q3400 switch box.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: For the SN6800 CPO switch, even though the bandwidth engine responsible for converting electrical to optical signals scales from 1.6T to 3.2T or 2x compared to the SN6600 switch, each 3.2T OE within the SN6800 switch box is split into four 800G logical ports that fan out within the box itself and exit the front panel through fiber connectors. This allows a single 1.6T GPU to fan out to two independent switch planes. In fact, the SN6800 switch box consists of four ASICs, which is similar to the X800-Q3400 switch box.

pro.text: 对于 SN6800 CPO 交换机，尽管负责电信号转光信号的带宽引擎规模从 SN6600 的 1.6T 翻倍扩展到了 3.2T，但 SN6800 交换机箱内的每个 3.2T 光学引擎（OE）被拆分为四个 800G 逻辑端口，在机箱内部进行扇出并从前面板的光纤接口引出。这使得单个 1.6T GPU 能够扇出到两个独立的交换平面。事实上，SN6800 交换机箱由四个 ASIC 组成，这与 X800-Q3400 交换机箱类似。

pro.text: 事实上，如果你还没注意到——本文前面解释的 X800-Q3400 交换机（非 CPO）与 CPO 交换机之间存在很强的相似性，因为两者都支持高吞吐基数（Radix）、多平面网络架构，同时在机箱内部封装了复杂的线缆，为客户省去了线缆管理的麻烦。

paragraphs.source: For Meta, we think the VR NVL72 deployments will comprise only of non-scheduled fabric (NSF) clusters built using Tomahawk 6-based Minipack-4 OCP Rack 102.4T switches in each datacenter. While Meta will be using optics to connect all the switches within its cluster, it will use 1.6T AECs for NIC-to-TOR connections once 1.6T AECs become broadly available in the market. We expect the 1.6T AEC ramp to happen in the second half of calendar year 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: For Meta, we think the VR NVL72 deployments will comprise only of non-scheduled fabric (NSF) clusters built using Tomahawk 6-based Minipack-4 OCP Rack 102.4T switches in each datacenter. While Meta will be using optics to connect all the switches within its cluster, it will use 1.6T AECs for NIC-to-TOR connections once 1.6T AECs become broadly available in the market. We expect the 1.6T AEC ramp to happen in the second half of calendar year 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: For Meta, we think the VR NVL72 deployments will comprise only of non-scheduled fabric (NSF) clusters built using Tomahawk 6-based Minipack-4 OCP Rack 102.4T switches in each datacenter. While Meta will be using optics to connect all the switches within its cluster, it will use 1.6T AECs for NIC-to-TOR connections once 1.6T AECs become broadly available in the market. We expect the 1.6T AEC ramp to happen in the second half of calendar year 2026.

pro.text: 对于 Meta，我们认为其 VR NVL72 部署将仅由非调度网络架构（Non-scheduled fabric，NSF）集群组成，这些集群在每个数据中心都使用基于 Tomahawk 6 的 Minipack-4 OCP 机架 102.4T 交换机。虽然 Meta 将使用光模块连接其集群内的所有交换机，但一旦 1.6T AEC 在市场上广泛普及，它将在网卡到机架顶端交换机（TOR）的连接中使用 1.6T AEC。我们预计 1.6T AEC 的放量将发生在 2026 日历年下半年。

paragraphs.source: The catch is that 102.4T Minipack-4 switches may not be shipped in time for Vera Rubin NVL72 rack deployments, and if this were to be the case, some NSF clusters will be shipped using 51.2T Minipack-3 switches instead. This means that gearboxes within the AECs will have to be used to convert 200G per lane SerDes speed at the NIC to 100G per lane SerDes speed at the switch.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The catch is that 102.4T Minipack-4 switches may not be shipped in time for Vera Rubin NVL72 rack deployments, and if this were to be the case, some NSF clusters will be shipped using 51.2T Minipack-3 switches instead. This means that gearboxes within the AECs will have to be used to convert 200G per lane SerDes speed at the NIC to 100G per lane SerDes speed at the switch.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The catch is that 102.4T Minipack-4 switches may not be shipped in time for Vera Rubin NVL72 rack deployments, and if this were to be the case, some NSF clusters will be shipped using 51.2T Minipack-3 switches instead. This means that gearboxes within the AECs will have to be used to convert 200G per lane SerDes speed at the NIC to 100G per lane SerDes speed at the switch.

pro.text: 棘手之处在于，102.4T 的 Minipack-4 交换机可能无法赶在 Vera Rubin NVL72 机柜部署时及时出货。如果情况确实如此，部分 NSF 集群将改为采用 51.2T 的 Minipack-3 交换机。这意味着必须利用 AEC 内部的速率转换芯片（Gearbox），将网卡（NIC）端每通道 200G 的 SerDes 速率转换为交换机端每通道 100G 的 SerDes 速率。

paragraphs.source: Meta will not be the only hyperscaler using 1.6T AECs for its VR200 deployments, however. We think xAI will use 1.6T AECs for both NIC-to-TOR and switch-to-switch connectivity at the leaf, spine and core layers. It will be a single-plane network replacing most 1.6T transceivers at the switch boxes – and this can give Credo plenty of pricing power.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Meta will not be the only hyperscaler using 1.6T AECs for its VR200 deployments, however. We think xAI will use 1.6T AECs for both NIC-to-TOR and switch-to-switch connectivity at the leaf, spine and core layers. It will be a single-plane network replacing most 1.6T transceivers at the switch boxes – and this can give Credo plenty of pricing power.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Meta will not be the only hyperscaler using 1.6T AECs for its VR200 deployments, however. We think xAI will use 1.6T AECs for both NIC-to-TOR and switch-to-switch connectivity at the leaf, spine and core layers. It will be a single-plane network replacing most 1.6T transceivers at the switch boxes – and this can give Credo plenty of pricing power.

pro.text: 然而，Meta 并非唯一在 VR200 部署中使用 1.6T AEC 的超大规模云厂商（Hyperscaler）。我们认为 xAI 将在叶层（leaf）、脊层（spine）和核心层（core）的“网卡到 TOR”以及“交换机到交换机”连接中均使用 1.6T AEC。这将是一个单平面网络，取代了交换机箱体上的大部分 1.6T 光收发器——这能为 Credo 提供充足的定价权。

sections.title: Hyperscaler Customization and Assembly Logistics
sections.title_translation: 超大规模云厂商定制化与组装物流

paragraphs.source: For GB300, although the reference design has four ConnectX-8 NICs for the backend network and one Bluefield-3 for frontend network, most hyperscalers have their own design and alternative networking configurations, especially for Bluefield-3. Beside networking configuration, the power delivery modules, the local NVMe storage, and the management module are also highly customized and differentiated across customers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: For GB300, although the reference design has four ConnectX-8 NICs for the backend network and one Bluefield-3 for frontend network, most hyperscalers have their own design and alternative networking configurations, especially for Bluefield-3. Beside networking configuration, the power delivery modules, the local NVMe storage, and the management module are also highly customized and differentiated across customers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: For GB300, although the reference design has four ConnectX-8 NICs for the backend network and one Bluefield-3 for frontend network, most hyperscalers have their own design and alternative networking configurations, especially for Bluefield-3. Beside networking configuration, the power delivery modules, the local NVMe storage, and the management module are also highly customized and differentiated across customers.

pro.text: 对于 GB300，尽管参考设计配备了四个用于后端网络的 ConnectX-8 网卡（NIC）和一个用于前端网络的 Bluefield-3，但大多数超大规模云厂商（hyperscalers）都有自己的设计和替代网络配置，特别是针对 Bluefield-3。除了网络配置外，供电模块、本地 NVMe 存储和管理模块在不同客户之间也具有高度的定制化和差异化。

understanding.role_in_article: 待分析

issues.description: 原文中第一句使用了 'DSP'，而紧随其后的第二句使用了 'DPU'。考虑到 Bluefield-4 是典型的 DPU，原文的 'DSP' 极大概率为笔误。译文机械地保留了 'DSP'，可能会误导硬核读者。
译文“一些客户还计划将二者合二为一”虽然准确，但稍显口语化。
JBOK 是一个非常小众且具有特定黑话色彩的术语（通常指 Just a Bunch of KonnectX，即纯网卡簇）。

paragraphs.source: For example, for some racks, even Amazon is deploying ConnectX-8 in GB300s in many cases. Also, most hyperscalers are deploying their in-house DPU instead of Bluefield-3 for frontend networking. The power delivery module and management modules in GB300 are also highly customized as every customer has differing preferences for these modules. As such, the front half of GB300 is highly customizable with each hyperscalers’ design differing from each other significantly.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: For example, for some racks, even Amazon is deploying ConnectX-8 in GB300s in many cases. Also, most hyperscalers are deploying their in-house DPU instead of Bluefield-3 for frontend networking. The power delivery module and management modules in GB300 are also highly customized as every customer has differing preferences for these modules. As such, the front half of GB300 is highly customizable with each hyperscalers’ design differing from each other significantly.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: For example, for some racks, even Amazon is deploying ConnectX-8 in GB300s in many cases. Also, most hyperscalers are deploying their in-house DPU instead of Bluefield-3 for frontend networking. The power delivery module and management modules in GB300 are also highly customized as every customer has differing preferences for these modules. As such, the front half of GB300 is highly customizable with each hyperscalers’ design differing from each other significantly.

pro.text: 例如，在某些机柜中，甚至亚马逊（Amazon）在许多情况下也会在 GB300 中部署 ConnectX-8。此外，大多数超大规模云厂商在前端网络中部署的是其自研 DPU，而非 Bluefield-3。由于每家客户对这些模块的偏好不同，GB300 中的供电模块和管理模块也经过了高度定制。因此，GB300 的前半部分具有极高的可定制性，各家超大规模云厂商的设计之间存在显著差异。

paragraphs.source: For VR NVL72, although some level of customization is still available, there are a lot more limitations on the form factor. Given the modular and the cableless design of VR NVl72, the customized modules at the front of the chassis must match the form factor and dimension of Nvidia’s reference design. The modules available for customization are power delivery, Bluefield-4, and management modules. We expect most hyperscaler customers to adopt their in-house DSP instead of Bluefield-4. Given the limitation on form factor and dimensions, hyperscalers are redesigning the board layout and module form factor of their in-house DPU to match that of Bluefield-4. For the power delivery modules and management, some customers are also looking to combine them.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: For VR NVL72, although some level of customization is still available, there are a lot more limitations on the form factor. Given the modular and the cableless design of VR NVl72, the customized modules at the front of the chassis must match the form factor and dimension of Nvidia’s reference design. The modules available for customization are power delivery, Bluefield-4, and management modules. We expect most hyperscaler customers to adopt their in-house DSP instead of Bluefield-4. Given the limitation on form factor and dimensions, hyperscalers are redesigning the board layout and module form factor of their in-house DPU to match that of Bluefield-4. For the power delivery modules and management, some customers are also looking to combine them. Amazon does have a JBOK / Nitro Box NIC version for VR NVL72
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: For VR NVL72, although some level of customization is still available, there are a lot more limitations on the form factor. Given the modular and the cableless design of VR NVl72, the customized modules at the front of the chassis must match the form factor and dimension of Nvidia’s reference design. The modules available for customization are power delivery, Bluefield-4, and management modules. We expect most hyperscaler customers to adopt their in-house DSP instead of Bluefield-4. Given the limitation on form factor and dimensions, hyperscalers are redesigning the board layout and module form factor of their in-house DPU to match that of Bluefield-4. For the power delivery modules and management, some customers are also looking to combine them. Amazon does have a JBOK / Nitro Box NIC version for VR NVL72

pro.text: 对于 VR NVL72，虽然仍保留了一定程度的定制化空间，但在外形规格（form factor）上存在更多限制。鉴于 VR NVL72 采用模块化和无线缆设计，机箱前端的定制模块必须符合英伟达参考设计的外形规格和尺寸。可供定制的模块包括供电模块、Bluefield-4 和管理模块。我们预计大多数超大规模云厂商客户将采用其自研 DSP 而非 Bluefield-4。考虑到外形规格和尺寸的限制，超大规模云厂商正在重新设计其自研 DPU 的电路板布局和模块外形，以匹配 Bluefield-4。对于供电模块和管理模块，一些客户还计划将二者合二为一。

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: For VR NVL72, although some level of customization is still available, there are a lot more limitations on the form factor. Given the modular and the cableless design of VR NVl72, the customized modules at the front of the chassis must match the form factor and dimension of Nvidia’s reference design. The modules available for customization are power delivery, Bluefield-4, and management modules. We expect most hyperscaler customers to adopt their in-house DSP instead of Bluefield-4. Given the limitation on form factor and dimensions, hyperscalers are redesigning the board layout and module form factor of their in-house DPU to match that of Bluefield-4. For the power delivery modules and management, some customers are also looking to combine them. Amazon does have a JBOK / Nitro Box NIC version for VR NVL72

paragraphs.source: At L6, board level PCBA, Wistron and Foxconn are the main supplier of Blackwell and Rubin. For L10, Blackwell had lots of different compute tray manufacturers as they buy the Bianca boards from Nvidia to sell to their clients. For Rubin, there are only three suppliers that have the capability to do automation of Rubin compute tray. For smaller ODM or OEM, they either have their compute tray made at the three automation suppliers mentioned above or they will do it in-house without automation. Although not as efficient, compute tray assembly without automation should be much easier compared to Blackwell as well given the seamless modular design. Then at L11, the various ODMs/OEMs assemble the compute tray into the rack.

For Rubin, there are only three suppliers that have the capability to do automation of Rubin compute tray. For smaller ODM or OEM, they either have their compute tray made at the three automation suppliers mentioned above or they will do it in-house without automation. Although not as efficient, compute tray assembly without automation should be much easier compared to Blackwell as well given the seamless modular design. Then at L11, the various ODMs/OEMs assemble the compute tray into the rack.

pro.text: 在 L6 级板卡级 PCBA 层面，纬创和富士康是 Blackwell 与 Rubin 的主要供应商。在 L10 级，Blackwell 拥有众多不同的算力托盘制造商，因为这些厂商从英伟达购买 Bianca 板卡后再销售给其客户。而对于 Rubin，目前仅有三家供应商具备实现 Rubin 算力托盘自动化的能力。规模较小的 ODM 或 OEM 厂商，要么选择在上述三家自动化供应商处代工其算力托盘，要么在内部进行非自动化组装。尽管效率较低，但得益于无缝的模块化设计，即使是非自动化的算力托盘组装，难度也比 Blackwell 时代要低得多。随后在 L11 级，各家 ODM/OEM 将算力托盘组装进机柜。

paragraphs.source: The VR NVL72 is more expensive on a per-GPU capital cost basis, ~45% higher vs GB300s and ~14-15% higher vs the MI4XX given a higher server cost on a per GPU basis. This results in a higher Capital Cost of Ownership (TCO). For example VR NVL 72 Hyperscaler Arista has a capital cost of $3.28 to MI4XX Hyperscaler of $2.86 per hour per GPU over a 4 year useful life. Our TCO Model runs on a 4y useful life for the purpose of calculating capital cost per hour to reflect a conservative business case, but most Neoclouds and Hyperscalers will use a 5-6y depreciation period and we think it is best to look at EBIT margins using this depreciation period. Our preferred yardstick is Project IRR, which is agnostic to the chosen depreciation period.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The VR NVL72 is more expensive on a per-GPU capital cost basis, ~45% higher vs GB300s and ~14-15% higher vs the MI4XX given a higher server cost on a per GPU basis. This results in a higher Capital Cost of Ownership (TCO). For example VR NVL 72 Hyperscaler Arista has a capital cost of $3.28 to MI4XX Hyperscaler of $2.86 per hour per GPU over a 4 year useful life. Our TCO Model runs on a 4y useful life for the purpose of calculating capital cost per hour to reflect a conservative business case, but most Neoclouds and Hyperscalers will use a 5-6y depreciation period and we think it is best to look at EBIT margins using this depreciation period. Our preferred yardstick is Project IRR, which is agnostic to the chosen depreciation period.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The VR NVL72 is more expensive on a per-GPU capital cost basis, ~45% higher vs GB300s and ~14-15% higher vs the MI4XX given a higher server cost on a per GPU basis. This results in a higher Capital Cost of Ownership (TCO). For example VR NVL 72 Hyperscaler Arista has a capital cost of $3.28 to MI4XX Hyperscaler of $2.86 per hour per GPU over a 4 year useful life. Our TCO Model runs on a 4y useful life for the purpose of calculating capital cost per hour to reflect a conservative business case, but most Neoclouds and Hyperscalers will use a 5-6y depreciation period and we think it is best to look at EBIT margins using this depreciation period. Our preferred yardstick is Project IRR, which is agnostic to the chosen depreciation period.

pro.text: 以单 GPU 资本支出成本计算，VR NVL72 价格更高，由于单 GPU 服务器成本上升，其比 GB300s 高出约 45%，比 MI4XX 高出约 14-15%。这导致了更高的资本总拥有成本（TCO）。例如，在 4 年的使用寿命内，VR NVL72 超大规模计算厂商 Arista 的单 GPU 每小时资本成本为 3.28 美元，而 MI4XX 超大规模计算厂商则为 2.86 美元。为了反映保守的商业案例，我们的总拥有成本模型在计算每小时资本成本时采用了 4 年使用寿命，但大多数新型云服务商 (Neoclouds) 和超大规模计算厂商会使用 5-6 年的折旧期，我们认为使用这一折旧期来观察息税前利润 (EBIT) 率最为合适。我们首选的衡量标准是项目内部收益率 (Project IRR)，它与所选的折旧期无关。

paragraphs.source: However, one advantage for Nvidia’s VR SOCAMM option is that NVIDIA directly procures memory, allowing them to negotiate long-term agreements, volume-preferential terms with memory suppliers and most importantly, VVIP pricing. We think this will shield end customers from spikes in memory costs as we outline in our AI server apocalypse note, and is another example of how, as the Central Bank of AI, Nvidia is effectively hedging DRAM prices for all of its customers.

pro.text: 然而，英伟达（NVIDIA） VR SOCAMM 方案的一个优势在于，英伟达直接采购内存，这使其能够与内存供应商谈判长期协议、大客户优惠条款，以及最重要的 VVIP 定价。正如我们在 AI 服务器启示录报告 中所述，我们认为这将保护终端客户免受内存成本飙升的影响，也是英伟达 作为 AI 中央银行 如何有效地为所有客户对冲 DRAM 价格的又一例证。

paragraphs.source: By contrast, AMD is much more exposed to DRAM price increases as it has about double the amount of DRAM, with about 55 TB per rack of LPDDR5 and 55 TB per rack of DDR5. For the AMD’s Helios rack scale system, AMD sells the GPU/board and does procure the LPDDR5 memory, but it does not procure DDR5 DRAM for rack compute trays; rack assemblers/ODMs source and integrate DDR5 memory. This leaves buyers of AMD’s racks more exposed because AMD is only able to potentially “hedge” the LPDDR5 portion via long-term contracts leaving the DDR5 portion completely exposed. Having double the DRAM content also nearly doubles the overall exposure.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: By contrast, AMD is much more exposed to DRAM price increases as it has about double the amount of DRAM, with about 55 TB per rack of LPDDR5 and 55 TB per rack of DDR5. For the AMD’s Helios rack scale system, AMD sells the GPU/board and does procure the LPDDR5 memory, but it does not procure DDR5 DRAM for rack compute trays; rack assemblers/ODMs source and integrate DDR5 memory. This leaves buyers of AMD’s racks more exposed because AMD is only able to potentially “hedge” the LPDDR5 portion via long-term contracts leaving the DDR5 portion completely exposed. Having double the DRAM content also nearly doubles the overall exposure.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: By contrast, AMD is much more exposed to DRAM price increases as it has about double the amount of DRAM, with about 55 TB per rack of LPDDR5 and 55 TB per rack of DDR5. For the AMD’s Helios rack scale system, AMD sells the GPU/board and does procure the LPDDR5 memory, but it does not procure DDR5 DRAM for rack compute trays; rack assemblers/ODMs source and integrate DDR5 memory. This leaves buyers of AMD’s racks more exposed because AMD is only able to potentially “hedge” the LPDDR5 portion via long-term contracts leaving the DDR5 portion completely exposed. Having double the DRAM content also nearly doubles the overall exposure.

pro.text: 相比之下，AMD 对 DRAM 价格上涨的风险敞口要大得多，因为其 DRAM 用量大约是英伟达的两倍，每机柜配备约 55 TB 的 LPDDR5 和 55 TB 的 DDR5。对于 AMD 的 Helios 机柜级系统，AMD 销售 GPU/板卡并确实采购 LPDDR5 内存，但它并不为机柜算力托盘采购 DDR5 DRAM；机柜组装商/ODM 负责采购并集成 DDR5 内存。这使得 AMD 机柜的买家面临更大的风险，因为 AMD 只能通过长期合同潜在地“对冲” LPDDR5 部分，而让 DDR5 部分完全暴露在风险中。DRAM 含量翻倍也意味着整体风险敞口几乎翻倍。

paragraphs.source: Helios memory costs are more likely to be passed through or re-priced by assemblers and therefore exhibit greater hikes in a memory upcycle. Therefore, we model lower memory price hikes for VR and GB compared to MI4XX below. Our MI400 rack assumptions reflect $8.70/GB LPDDR pricing for AMD versus $6.77/GB for Nvidia, embedding volume discount structures vs the market contract price of $10.63/GB but reflecting the slack of volume economics vs NVIDIA.

Our MI400 rack assumptions reflect $8.70/GB LPDDR pricing for AMD versus $6.77/GB for Nvidia, embedding volume discount structures vs the market contract price of $10.63/GB but reflecting the slack of volume economics vs NVIDIA.

pro.text: Helios 的内存成本更有可能被组装商转嫁或重新定价，因此在内存上行周期中会表现出更大的涨幅。因此，在下文中，我们为 VR 和 GB 设定的内存价格涨幅低于 MI4XX。我们对 MI400 机柜的假设反映了 AMD 的 LPDDR 价格为 8.70 美元/GB，而英伟达为 6.77 美元/GB，这虽然包含了相对于 10.63 美元/GB 市场合同价的批量折扣结构，但也反映了其与英伟达相比在规模经济上的差距。

paragraphs.source: NVIDIA’s 2300W configuration represents the Max-P configuration, while the efficiency optimized Max-Q configuration runs at 1800W. Regardless of which configuration Nvidia claims both can hit the same peak clocks and therefore achieve marketed 50 PFLOPS FP4 performance. While the underlying hardware is the same, the TCO implications are due to operating costs from different levels of power consumption.

paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: NVIDIA’s 2300W configuration represents the Max-P configuration, while the efficiency optimized Max-Q configuration runs at 1800W. While the underlying hardware is the same, the TCO implications are due to operating costs from different levels of power consumption.

pro.text: 英伟达（NVIDIA）的 2300W 配置代表了 Max-P 配置，而针对能效优化的 Max-Q 配置运行功率为 1800W。无论采用哪种配置，英伟达都声称两者都能达到相同的峰值频率，从而实现其宣传的 50 PFLOPS FP4 性能。虽然底层硬件相同，但总拥有成本的影响主要源于不同功耗水平带来的运营成本差异。

paragraphs.source: VR Max-Q on the other hand, exhibits lower Operating costs relative to MI4XX given the lower chip TDP. For example a VR NVL 72 cluster deployed at a Hyperscaler with Arista networking would have a operating cost of $0.75 per gpu per hour, representing ~20% lower costs vs MI4XX deployed with a Hyperscaler with the same Arista networking. This highlights the advantages of the Max-Q configuration, particularly from an operating cost perspective, as the lower power TDP reduces rack-level power density for a meaningful cost savings over time.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: VR Max-Q on the other hand, exhibits lower Operating costs relative to MI4XX given the lower chip TDP. For example a VR NVL 72 cluster deployed at a Hyperscaler with Arista networking would have a operating cost of $0.75 per gpu per hour, representing ~20% lower costs vs MI4XX deployed with a Hyperscaler with the same Arista networking. This highlights the advantages of the Max-Q configuration, particularly from an operating cost perspective, as the lower power TDP reduces rack-level power density for a meaningful cost savings over time.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: VR Max-Q on the other hand, exhibits lower Operating costs relative to MI4XX given the lower chip TDP. For example a VR NVL 72 cluster deployed at a Hyperscaler with Arista networking would have a operating cost of $0.75 per gpu per hour, representing ~20% lower costs vs MI4XX deployed with a Hyperscaler with the same Arista networking. This highlights the advantages of the Max-Q configuration, particularly from an operating cost perspective, as the lower power TDP reduces rack-level power density for a meaningful cost savings over time.

pro.text: 另一方面，由于芯片 TDP 较低，VR Max-Q 的运营成本低于 MI4XX。例如，在采用 Arista 网络配置的超大规模云厂商处部署的 VR NVL72 集群，每 GPU 每小时的运营成本为 0.75 美元，相比在相同 Arista 网络环境下部署的 MI4XX，其成本降低了约 20%。这突显了 Max-Q 配置的优势，特别是从运营成本的角度来看，较低的 TDP 降低了机柜级功率密度，从而随着时间的推移实现显著的成本节约。

paragraphs.source: The MI4XX currently has a performance per TCO advantage based on marketed dense FLOPS over VR. VR has a higher TCO per GPU compared to MI4XX, yet VR marketed PFLOPs are lower vs MI4XX resulting in a TCO per PFLOP disadvantage for the VR vs MI4XX.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The MI4XX currently has a performance per TCO advantage based on marketed dense FLOPS over VR. VR has a higher TCO per GPU compared to MI4XX, yet VR marketed PFLOPs are lower vs MI4XX resulting in a TCO per PFLOP disadvantage for the VR vs MI4XX.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The MI4XX currently has a performance per TCO advantage based on marketed dense FLOPS over VR. VR has a higher TCO per GPU compared to MI4XX, yet VR marketed PFLOPs are lower vs MI4XX resulting in a TCO per PFLOP disadvantage for the VR vs MI4XX.

pro.text: 目前，基于官方公布的稠密（dense）FLOPS，MI4XX 相较于 VR 在单位总拥有成本（TCO）性能上具有优势。与 MI4XX 相比，VR 的单 GPU TCO 更高，但其官方公布的 PFLOPS 却低于 MI4XX，导致 VR 在单位 PFLOP 的 TCO 方面处于劣势。

此处指 GPU 的显存带宽，译文中“显存带宽”与“内存带宽”交替使用。

paragraphs.source: NVIDIA is offering sparsity for FP4, marketing 50 PFLOPS of FP4, while AMD has opsted to remove sparsity support since CDNA4 for inference dtypes. Harnessing the 50 PFLOPS sparse vs 35 PFLOPS dense drops the cost per perf in units of $/hr per Marketed PFLOP by 35% – a valid comparison if AI Labs can indeed successfully harness Sparse FP4 on the VR NVL72.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: NVIDIA is offering sparsity for FP4, marketing 50 PFLOPS of FP4, while AMD has opsted to remove sparsity support since CDNA4 for inference dtypes. Harnessing the 50 PFLOPS sparse vs 35 PFLOPS dense drops the cost per perf in units of $/hr per Marketed PFLOP by 35% – a valid comparison if AI Labs can indeed successfully harness Sparse FP4 on the VR NVL72.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: NVIDIA is offering sparsity for FP4, marketing 50 PFLOPS of FP4, while AMD has opsted to remove sparsity support since CDNA4 for inference dtypes. Harnessing the 50 PFLOPS sparse vs 35 PFLOPS dense drops the cost per perf in units of $/hr per Marketed PFLOP by 35% – a valid comparison if AI Labs can indeed successfully harness Sparse FP4 on the VR NVL72.

pro.text: 英伟达（NVIDIA）为 FP4 提供了稀疏性（sparsity）支持，宣称其 FP4 性能可达 50 PFLOPS；而 AMD 自 CDNA4 架构起，已选择在推理数据类型中移除稀疏性支持。如果能利用 50 PFLOPS 的稀疏性能而非 35 PFLOPS 的稠密性能，那么以“每小时每官方 PFLOP 成本”衡量的单位性能成本将下降 35% —— 如果 AI 实验室确实能在 VR NVL72 上成功利用稀疏 FP4，这一对比就是有效的。

译文“交互性（interactivity）为 100”过于字面化。

此处指 GPU 的显存带宽，译文中“显存带宽”与“内存带宽”交替使用。

paragraphs.source: As always, one caveat is that this comparison is done based on a marketed dense PFLOP basis. Effective dense PFLOP (i.e. the real world chip throughput) can differ based on Model Flops Utilization % (MFU), and in general we have seen NVIDIA chip operate at a higher MFU % vs AMD chips, suggesting that performance per TCO based on effective dense PFLOPs could be better for NVIDIA systems vs AMD – however, MFU is dependent on actual workloads with no one-size-fits-all MFU % that is consistently applicable to either systems.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As always, one caveat is that this comparison is done based on a marketed dense PFLOP basis. Effective dense PFLOP (i.e. the real world chip throughput) can differ based on Model Flops Utilization % (MFU), and in general we have seen NVIDIA chip operate at a higher MFU % vs AMD chips, suggesting that performance per TCO based on effective dense PFLOPs could be better for NVIDIA systems vs AMD – however, MFU is dependent on actual workloads with no one-size-fits-all MFU % that is consistently applicable to either systems.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As always, one caveat is that this comparison is done based on a marketed dense PFLOP basis. Effective dense PFLOP (i.e. the real world chip throughput) can differ based on Model Flops Utilization % (MFU), and in general we have seen NVIDIA chip operate at a higher MFU % vs AMD chips, suggesting that performance per TCO based on effective dense PFLOPs could be better for NVIDIA systems vs AMD – however, MFU is dependent on actual workloads with no one-size-fits-all MFU % that is consistently applicable to either systems.

pro.text: 一如既往，需要说明的是，此番对比是基于官方公布的稠密 PFLOP 数据。有效稠密 PFLOP（即芯片在真实世界中的吞吐量）会因模型算力利用率（MFU）的不同而有所差异。通常情况下，我们观察到英伟达芯片的 MFU 高于 AMD 芯片，这表明如果基于有效稠密 PFLOP 计算，英伟达系统的单位 TCO 性能可能优于 AMD。然而，MFU 取决于实际工作负载，并没有一个通用的 MFU 百分比能始终适用于这两类系统。

paragraphs.source: Indeed, real world use of FP4 Sparsity will probably not reach 50 PFLOPS but it will probably deliver better effective FLOPs than FP4 Dense, but we have yet to evaluate what that real-world performance could be. Running VR NVL72 on 1800W would probably mean lower FP4 Sparse FLOPs than on 2300W.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Indeed, real world use of FP4 Sparsity will probably not reach 50 PFLOPS but it will probably deliver better effective FLOPs than FP4 Dense, but we have yet to evaluate what that real-world performance could be. Running VR NVL72 on 1800W would probably mean lower FP4 Sparse FLOPs than on 2300W.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Indeed, real world use of FP4 Sparsity will probably not reach 50 PFLOPS but it will probably deliver better effective FLOPs than FP4 Dense, but we have yet to evaluate what that real-world performance could be. Running VR NVL72 on 1800W would probably mean lower FP4 Sparse FLOPs than on 2300W.

pro.text: 事实上，在真实场景中使用 FP4 稀疏性可能无法达到 50 PFLOPS，但其提供的有效 FLOPS 很可能高于 FP4 稠密性能，不过我们尚需评估其实际表现。在 1800W 功耗下运行 VR NVL72，其 FP4 稀疏 FLOPS 可能会低于在 2300W 下运行的表现。

paragraphs.source: Inference throughput too can diverge materially from marketed peak FLOPS, meaning spec-sheet compute does not directly translate into real-world token generation performance. While the B300 is rated at 4,500 Dense FP8 TFLOPs versus 5,000 Dense FP8 TFLOPs for MI355, implying a 10% theoretical compute disadvantage and with same marketed memory bandwidth of 8TB/s measured inference token throughput from our InferenceX benchmarks shows B300 delivering roughly 6.3x the performance at 100 interactivity for Deepseek R1, using 8k input tokens and 1k output tokens.

inline_elements.text: InferenceX

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Inference throughput too can diverge materially from marketed peak FLOPS, meaning spec-sheet compute does not directly translate into real-world token generation performance. While the B300 is rated at 4,500 Dense FP8 TFLOPs versus 5,000 Dense FP8 TFLOPs for MI355, implying a 10% theoretical compute disadvantage and with same marketed memory bandwidth of 8TB/s measured inference token throughput from our [InferenceX](https://inferencex.semianalysis.com/) benchmarks shows B300 delivering roughly 6.3x the performance at 100 interactivity for Deepseek R1, using 8k input tokens and 1k output tokens.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Inference throughput too can diverge materially from marketed peak FLOPS, meaning spec-sheet compute does not directly translate into real-world token generation performance. While the B300 is rated at 4,500 Dense FP8 TFLOPs versus 5,000 Dense FP8 TFLOPs for MI355, implying a 10% theoretical compute disadvantage and with same marketed memory bandwidth of 8TB/s measured inference token throughput from our InferenceX benchmarks shows B300 delivering roughly 6.3x the performance at 100 interactivity for Deepseek R1, using 8k input tokens and 1k output tokens.

parent_inline_elements.text: InferenceX

pro.text: 推理吞吐量也可能与官方宣传的峰值 FLOPS 存在实质性差异，这意味着规格表上的算力并不能直接转化为现实世界中的 Token 生成性能。虽然 B300 的额定性能为 4,500 Dense FP8 TFLOPs，而 MI355 为 5,000 Dense FP8 TFLOPs，这意味着 B300 在理论算力上存在 10% 的劣势，且两者宣传的显存带宽均为 8TB/s；但根据我们 InferenceX 基准测试测得的推理 Token 吞吐量显示，在处理 Deepseek R1 模型、使用 8k 输入 Token 和 1k 输出 Token 且交互性（interactivity）为 100 的情况下，B300 提供的性能大约是后者的 6.3 倍。
pro.tokenized_text: 推理吞吐量也可能与官方宣传的峰值 FLOPS 存在实质性差异，这意味着规格表上的算力并不能直接转化为现实世界中的 Token 生成性能。虽然 B300 的额定性能为 4,500 Dense FP8 TFLOPs，而 MI355 为 5,000 Dense FP8 TFLOPs，这意味着 B300 在理论算力上存在 10% 的劣势，且两者宣传的显存带宽均为 8TB/s；但根据我们 [[[LINK_1|InferenceX]]] 基准测试测得的推理 Token 吞吐量显示，在处理 Deepseek R1 模型、使用 8k 输入 Token 和 1k 输出 Token 且交互性（interactivity）为 100 的情况下，B300 提供的性能大约是后者的 6.3 倍。

译文“总拥有成本（TCO）仅高出 1.75 倍”在中文逻辑中易产生歧义（是 A=B*1.75 还是 A=B+B*1.75）。

paragraphs.source: Given that total cost of ownership is only 1.75x higher, this results in a superior performance-per-TCO profile for B300 despite the more modest marketed figures. Such a wildly different result despite very similar specs underscores that real world performance is not dictated by peak FLOPS or memory bandwidth alone. Software and network capabilities are also major factors that contribute to training and token throughput in real workloads.

Software and network capabilities are also major factors that contribute to training and token throughput in real workloads.

pro.text: 考虑到总拥有成本（TCO）仅高出 1.75 倍，尽管官方宣传数据较为保守，B300 依然展现出更优越的单位总拥有成本（TCO）性能表现。尽管规格非常相似，但结果却大相径庭，这凸显了现实世界的性能并非仅由峰值 FLOPS 或显存带宽决定。软件和网络能力也是影响实际工作负载中训练和 Token 吞吐量的主要因素。

paragraphs.source: Since Nvidia ~~acquired Groq~~ entered into a licensing agreement for Groq’s technology and hired Groq’s key people December 2025, speculation has brewed on how exactly Nvidia will implement Groq’s technology. We believe that Nvidia will introduce a new LPU rack at GTC 2026. The LPU rack is designed to be used alongside Nvidia GPUs for inference.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Since Nvidia ~~acquired Groq~~ entered into a licensing agreement for Groq’s technology and hired Groq’s key people December 2025, speculation has brewed on how exactly Nvidia will implement Groq’s technology. We believe that Nvidia will introduce a new LPU rack at GTC 2026. The LPU rack is designed to be used alongside Nvidia GPUs for inference.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Since Nvidia ~~acquired Groq~~ entered into a licensing agreement for Groq’s technology and hired Groq’s key people December 2025, speculation has brewed on how exactly Nvidia will implement Groq’s technology. We believe that Nvidia will introduce a new LPU rack at GTC 2026. The LPU rack is designed to be used alongside Nvidia GPUs for inference.

pro.text: 自从英伟达（NVIDIA）在 2025 年 12 月~~收购了 Groq~~ 与 Groq 签署了技术授权协议并聘用了其核心人员以来，关于英伟达将如何具体应用 Groq 技术的猜测便层出不穷。我们认为，英伟达将在 GTC 2026 上推出一款全新的 LPU 机柜。该 LPU 机柜旨在与英伟达 GPU 配合使用，共同进行推理。

issues.description: 译文将 Decode 环节翻译为 'Decode 环节（Decode Loop）'，虽然准确，但考虑到全文硬核背景，Decode 环节在 LLM 推理语境下通常指代 Token 生成阶段，建议在首现处保留英文或使用更具工程感的 'Decode 阶段'。
译文使用了 '并行运行'，但在机柜级（Rack-scale）架构语境下，'sit alongside' 更多指物理上的协同部署或在同一集群内互补。

paragraphs.source: With CPX being designed specifically for inference pre-fill, the LPU system is designed for inference decode given the LPU’s emphasis on higher bandwidth SRAM. This comes at the expense of total throughput so this LPU decode system could be positioned at serving requests that require very high tokens per second per user, with the user paying much higher $/token to compensate for higher cost to serve.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: With CPX being designed specifically for inference pre-fill, the LPU system is designed for inference decode given the LPU’s emphasis on higher bandwidth SRAM. This comes at the expense of total throughput so this LPU decode system could be positioned at serving requests that require very high tokens per second per user, with the user paying much higher $/token to compensate for higher cost to serve.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: With CPX being designed specifically for inference pre-fill, the LPU system is designed for inference decode given the LPU’s emphasis on higher bandwidth SRAM. This comes at the expense of total throughput so this LPU decode system could be positioned at serving requests that require very high tokens per second per user, with the user paying much higher $/token to compensate for higher cost to serve.

pro.text: 鉴于 CPX 专为推理 Pre-fill 环节设计，而 LPU 强调更高带宽的 SRAM，因此 LPU 系统是针对推理 Decode 环节（Decode Loop）设计的。这是以牺牲总吞吐量为代价的，因此该 LPU Decode 系统可能被定位为服务那些对“每用户每秒 Token 数”要求极高的请求，而用户则需支付更高的单位 Token 价格，以补偿更高的服务成本。
